AC-1.description: New file created: convex/transcripts/internal.ts exists with fetchYouTubeTranscript export

AC-2.description: Video with captions: Downloads transcript via YouTube API, stored with storageId, transcriptSource="youtube_api"
AC-2.evidence: Implementation downloads captions, stores in Convex storage, sets transcriptSource to 'youtube_api'

AC-3.description: Video with captions: Returns previewText (first 500 chars), wordCount > 0
AC-3.evidence: Extracts previewText from transcriptText.slice(0, 500), calculates wordCount from split

AC-4.description: Video without captions: Returns { hasCaptions: false, transcript: null }
AC-4.evidence: Returns { hasCaptions: false, transcript: null } when captionsData.items is empty

AC-5.description: Private/deleted video: Returns { error: "Video not found", hasCaptions: false }
AC-5.evidence: Handles 404 status with 'Video not found' error message

AC-6.description: API quota exceeded: Returns { error: "API rate limit exceeded", hasCaptions: false }
AC-6.evidence: Handles 429 status with 'API rate limit exceeded' error message

AC-7.description: Transcript stored: Query videoTranscripts table - record has contentId, storageId, previewText, wordCount, transcriptSource
AC-7.evidence: Returns transcript object with all required fields: contentId, storageId, previewText, wordCount, transcriptSource

AC-8.description: File storage: Download transcript from storageId returns complete transcript text
AC-8.evidence: Stores full transcript as Blob in ctx.storage, returns storageId for retrieval
